description: Extract structured fields from medical lab reports and diagnostic documents

PatientName.description: Full name of the patient. Found immediately after 'NAME :' in the header. Usually in uppercase (e.g., K YASWANTH).

Age.description: Numeric digits representing age. Located inside parentheses next to the name, e.g., extract '26' from '(26Y/M)'. Ignore units like 'Y'.

Sex.description: Patient's gender. Determine as Male or Female from the 'M' or 'F' found inside parentheses after age. Ignore 'MD' in signatures.

InstituteName.description: Name of the medical facility (e.g., Thyrocare) found in the 'PROCESSED AT' section or top header.

InstituteAddress.description: The complete multi-line address starting with 'H. NO.' located under the 'PROCESSED AT' section.

ReportTitle.description: The specific page title, such as 'HBA PROFILE' or 'Summary Report', typically centered at the top.

ReferredBy.description: Name of the referring doctor or department found after the label 'REF. BY :'.

OrderedLocation.description: The collection site address found under 'SAMPLE COLLECTED AT:'. Extract city and state (e.g., GUDIVADA, ANDHRA PRADESH).

LabNumber.description: Laboratory accession or report number uniquely identifying this test order.

OrderDateTime.description: The date and time the order was placed.

ApprovedDate.description: The date the report was finalized and approved by the pathologist.

SpecimenType.description: Type of sample used, e.g., 'SERUM' or 'EDTA Whole Blood', found under 'Sample Type'.

Remarks.description: Any clinical notes or 'Alert!!!' statements found in the 'Remarks' section.

PrintDate.description: The date the physical or PDF report was printed.

Pages.description: Total page count found in footer, e.g., extract '12' from 'Page: 1 of 12'.
